org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.selection

Class SelectionManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.selection.SelectionManager<OBJ>
      • org.arakhne.afc.ui.selection.TreeSetSelectionManager<Figure>
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.selection.SelectionManager
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Iterable<Figure>, Collection<Figure>, Set<Figure>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    JSelectionManager

    public class SelectionManager
extends TreeSetSelectionManager<Figure>
    This class is the selection manager. It is basically a collection of selected figures.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from class org.arakhne.afc.ui.selection.TreeSetSelectionManager

        storage

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      SelectionManager()
      Create a new SelectionManager.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void cleanUp()
      Clean the selected elements.
      boolean containsDecorationFigure()
      Replies if the contains contains at least one decoration figure.
      boolean containsEdgeFigure()
      Replies if the contains contains at least one edge figure.
      boolean containsLinearFeature()
      Replies if the contains contains at least one linear feature.
      boolean containsNodeFigure()
      Replies if the contains contains at least one node figure.
      boolean containsNoLinearFeature()
      Replies if the contains contains at least one that is not a linear feature.
      boolean containsUnknownTypeFigure()
      Replies if the contains contains at least one figure that is not a node, nor an edge, nor a decoration.
      Rectangle2f getBounds()
      Returns the bounds covered by the selected objects.
      boolean isAllLocked()
      Replies if the selected figures are all locked.
      protected void onAddedObject(Figure object) 
      protected void onRemovedObject(Figure object) 
      protected void resetInternalBuffers()

        addInStorage, clearStorage, contains, containsAll, getIteratorOnStorage, isEmpty, removeFromStorage, size, toArray, toArray

        add, addAll, addSelectionListener, clear, fireSelected, fireUnselected, iterator, remove, removeAll, removeSelectionListener, retainAll, setSelection, setSelection, toggle, toggle, updateSystemSelection

        equals, hashCode

        Create a new SelectionManager.

    • Method Detail

      • getBounds

        public Rectangle2f getBounds()
        Returns the bounds covered by the selected objects.
        Returns:
        the bound of the selection.

      • cleanUp

        public void cleanUp()
        Clean the selected elements.

      • resetInternalBuffers

        protected void resetInternalBuffers()
        Overrides:
        resetInternalBuffers in class SelectionManager<Figure>

        onRemovedObject in class SelectionManager<Figure>

      • onAddedObject

        protected void onAddedObject(Figure object)
        Overrides:
        onAddedObject in class SelectionManager<Figure>

      • containsDecorationFigure

        public boolean containsDecorationFigure()
        Replies if the contains contains at least one decoration figure.
        Returns:
        true if the selection contains at least one decoration figure
        See Also:
        containsNodeFigure(), containsEdgeFigure(), containsUnknownTypeFigure(), containsNoLinearFeature()

      • containsNodeFigure

        public boolean containsNodeFigure()
        Replies if the contains contains at least one node figure.
        Returns:
        true if the selection contains at least one node figure
        See Also:
        containsDecorationFigure(), containsEdgeFigure(), containsUnknownTypeFigure(), containsLinearFeature(), containsNoLinearFeature()

      • containsEdgeFigure

        public boolean containsEdgeFigure()
        Replies if the contains contains at least one edge figure.
        Returns:
        true if the selection contains at least one edge figure
        See Also:
        containsDecorationFigure(), containsNodeFigure(), containsUnknownTypeFigure(), containsLinearFeature(), containsNoLinearFeature()

      • containsUnknownTypeFigure

        public boolean containsUnknownTypeFigure()
        Replies if the contains contains at least one figure that is not a node, nor an edge, nor a decoration.
        Returns:
        true if the selection contains at least one figure of unknown type.
        See Also:
        containsDecorationFigure(), containsNodeFigure(), containsEdgeFigure(), containsLinearFeature(), containsNoLinearFeature()

      • containsLinearFeature

        public boolean containsLinearFeature()
        Replies if the contains contains at least one linear feature.
        Returns:
        true if the selection contains at least one linear feature.
        See Also:
        containsDecorationFigure(), containsNodeFigure(), containsEdgeFigure(), containsUnknownTypeFigure(), containsNoLinearFeature()

      • containsNoLinearFeature

        public boolean containsNoLinearFeature()
        Replies if the contains contains at least one that is not a linear feature.
        Returns:
        true if the selection contains at least one object that is not a linear feature.
        See Also:
        containsDecorationFigure(), containsNodeFigure(), containsEdgeFigure(), containsUnknownTypeFigure(), containsLinearFeature()

      • isAllLocked

        public boolean isAllLocked()
        Replies if the selected figures are all locked.
        Returns:
        true if all the figures are locked; otherwise false.
